name: Kunkka
description: Step lively now, your Admiral is on board!

abilities.name: Admiral's Rum
abilities.description: Douses himself with the Admiral's signature rum upon taking additional player-based damage instances when reaching a certain health threshold. The Rum buff grants bonus movement speed and damage reduction for a period of time. Health Threshold: 65%. Move Speed Bonus: 7.75%. Damage Reduction: 18%. Damage Timer: 6. Rum Buff Duration: 6 (7). Move Speed Bonus Increase: 0.25%. Cooldown: 60.5.

abilities.name: Torrent
abilities.description: Summons a rising torrent that, after a short delay, stuns and hurls enemy units into the sky. Cast Range: 1300. Radius: 250 (350). Stun Duration: 1.4 (1.75). Knock-Up Duration: 1.33 (1.66). Total Damage: 110/180/250/320 (137.5/225/312.5/400). Move Speed Slow: 40%. Cooldown: 16/14/12/10. Mana Cost: 90.

abilities.name: Tidebringer
abilities.description: Grants increased damage and cleaves a large area of effect in front of Kunkka for a single strike. The Tidebringer attack now ignores a certain amount of the armor damage factor. Only affects the Tidebringer damage instance. Cast Range: 150. First Width: 150 (250). Distance: 650/775/900/1025 (750/875/1000/1125). End Width: 500/550/600/650 (600/650/700/750). Cleave Damage: 150% (230%). Attack Damage Bonus: 35/70/105/140 (110/145/180/215). Cooldown: 13/10/7/4.

abilities.name: X Marks the Spot
abilities.description: The Admiral's set of arcane abilities includes some that can be used for battle as well as entertainment. Cast Range: 550/700/850/1000. Enemy Duration: 3. Ally Duration: 6. Cooldown: 24/20/16/12. Mana Cost: 50.

abilities.name: Tidal Wave
abilities.description: Calls upon a tidal wave from behind Kunkka that deals damage, disarms, and drags enemy units along it. Cast Range: 1050. Travel Distance: 1800. Radius: 750 (850). Damage: 180. Knock Distance: 600. Knock Duration: 1. Cooldown: 12. Mana Cost: 75.

abilities.name: Ghostship
abilities.description: Summons a ghostly ship that sails through the battle before smashing apart, damaging and stunning all enemies caught near the wreckage. Summons a fleet of Ghost ships on a 2.5 second interval. Each ship now also fires waves of cannonballs from the port and starboard side dealing part of Ghostship's damage as they pass through enemies. Cast Range: 1000. Number of Ships: 1 (2). Ship Radius: 450 (550). Travel Distance: 2000. Ship Spawn Interval: 3.5. Impact Damage: 350/475/600. Cooldown: 90/80/70. Mana Cost: 125/175/225.
